rules: Jupiter/Solana and Coinbase CDP/Base are co-primary equal first-tier venues; select the best verified risk-adjusted net outcome after all costs.
PancakeSwap Base and Solana are first-tier research and quote discovery venues; execution remains gated until Permit2/simulation/adapter/receipt gates pass.
All remaining venues are secondary and require independent readiness plus platform-local policy approval.
Each platform keeps its own signer and policy scope.
Cross-platform comparison is allowed; cross-chain transfer is not implied.
A transfer or bridge requires its own route, recipient, fee, finality, and recovery gate.
Global portfolio limits apply across all platforms.
Platform-local limits may be stricter than global limits.

execution_constraints: Use tools/cdp_base_executor.mjs only; no arbitrary calldata or contract calls.
Require fresh quote with liquidityAvailable=true and simulationIncomplete=false.
Require positive risk-adjusted net edge, current balance reconciliation, and supervisor authorization.
Permit2 approval, if required, must be exact amount and independently finalized before swap.
No automatic retry after any broadcast; verify receipt and post-trade balances independently.

aerodrome_base.reason_disabled: Replaced as the preferred Base venue by PancakeSwap. No Aerodrome adapter, approval, position, or execution path is enabled.

pancakeswap_base.reason_disabled: Official Smart Router quote verified on Base. Execution remains blocked pending an independently simulated exact-amount Permit2 approval/permit flow and a bounded CDP transaction adapter; no generic signer or arbitrary calldata is enabled.

pancakeswap_solana.reason_disabled: Preferred PancakeSwap Solana research/quote venue. Requires verified official program IDs/routes, instruction decoding, simulation, fee/slippage controls, and post-trade reconciliation before any execution.

robinhood_agentic.reason_disabled: MCP endpoint is configured but requires Robinhood desktop authentication and dedicated Agentic account onboarding.

activation_gates: dedicated signer and transaction adapter built
small funded test and independent finality/balance reconciliation passed
robinhood_chain.reason_disabled: Robinhood announced a Layer-2 blockchain, but official production RPC, chain ID, wallet, asset, and developer execution surfaces are not yet independently verified. Keep dormant and separate from Robinhood Agentic/MCP until readiness gates pass.

tronlink_tron.reason_disabled: Requires verified TronLink connection, local user approval, supported network detection, and read-only balance verification.

sunswap_tron.reason_disabled: Requires official SunSwap route/contract verification, quote validation, slippage/deadline controls, simulation, and post-trade verification.

avantis_base.reason_disabled: Requires dedicated perps risk policy, leverage cap, liquidation/mark-price checks, funding and fee modeling, unsigned calldata review, and independent post-trade verification.

global_policy.strategy_mandate: Profit-seeking strategies are authorized across spot, perpetuals, earn/yield, predictions, liquidity provision, staking, and lending. No strategy class is excluded merely because it is not spot; each action still requires verified platform support, contract/program allowlisting, current reconciliation, positive risk-adjusted net edge, strategy-specific risk limits, simulation where applicable, supervisor authorization, and independent verification. Mandatory pre-buy research applies to every coin, token, and tokenized asset before any buy consideration.
global_policy.bridge_policy: Permission granted only for explicitly allowlisted source/destination wallets, exact chain and asset mappings, verified bridge route, positive net edge after all costs, simulation where available, supervisor authorization, finality monitoring, and independent destination reconciliation. No generic bridge or arbitrary contract calls.
